selections.name: Winter's Ghost
selections.reason: Dropping in class from SOC8000 to $5k claimers. Has solid back class and tactical speed to sit a good trip.

selections.name: Secret Treasure
selections.reason: Consistent runner dropping from starter allowance company. Should appreciate the class relief.

selections.name: Vanzzy
selections.reason: Takes a slight drop and has competitive speed figures for this level. Can factor in the exotics.

selections.name: Hardy Choice
selections.reason: Recent winner at the $5k claiming level. Steps up slightly but maintains solid form.

danger_horse.name: Russian Hammer
danger_horse.reason: Drawn the rail and dropping in class; could flash early speed and hold on for a piece.

selections.name: Grey Bull
selections.reason: Jamie Ness and Paco Lopez team up. Showed strong figures at Aqueduct and Parx; looks primed for graduation.

selections.name: Clockwork
selections.reason: Godolphin homebred debuting for Michael Stidham. Works suggest readiness.

selections.name: No More Kings
selections.reason: Ran a solid 3rd in MSW company here last out. Experience over the track is a plus.

selections.name: Witness Protection
selections.reason: Another Stidham first-time starter with a solid pedigree. Warrants respect.

danger_horse.name: D'oro Cavallo
danger_horse.reason: First-time starter drawing the rail; could surprise if breaking alertly.

selections.name: Miguel's Belle
selections.reason: Ness/Lopez connection. Dropping from SOC5000 and boasts the highest speed figures in the field.

selections.name: Ritabook
selections.reason: Coming off a win at the CLM10000C level. Sharp form makes her a major contender.

selections.name: R Averie Lynn
selections.reason: Won a starter allowance last out. Outside draw is favorable for her tactical speed.

selections.name: Cocoa's Vivian
selections.reason: Taking a significant class drop from AOC50000 company. Dangerous at this level.

danger_horse.name: Bella Prima
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw and consistent claiming form; could hit the board at a price.

selections.name: Braquet
selections.reason: Dropping from allowance optional claiming company at Penn National. Class relief makes her the one to beat.

selections.name: Chelsea Wall
selections.reason: Ness/Lopez runner who just missed in SOC8000 company. Logical threat.

selections.name: Golden Eib Micrphn
selections.reason: Recent winner at the SOC8000/15000C level. Rail draw should allow for a ground-saving trip.

selections.name: Sister Supream
selections.reason: Consistent type who hit the board in similar company last out. Good for exotics.

danger_horse.name: C C Girl
danger_horse.reason: Steps up after a win but has the speed figures to compete if she gets an easy lead.

selections.name: Starmetal
selections.reason: Ran a strong 2nd in MSW company at Laurel. Drops into maiden claiming and looks formidable.

selections.name: Rum Rock
selections.reason: Ness/Lopez entry making a surface/distance change. Must be respected on connections alone.

selections.name: Andolin
selections.reason: Finished 2nd in MSW company here recently. Outside post is tricky but has the talent.

selections.name: Capitaine
selections.reason: Runner-up in MCL25000 at Delaware last out. Fits well in this spot.

danger_horse.name: Mr Skinny
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw on the tight turf course could yield a ground-saving trip for a share.

selections.name: Mr. Ripple
selections.reason: Strong 2nd in SOC12500 company. Figures are consistently high and outside draw keeps him out of trouble.

selections.name: Sundaeswithsandy
selections.reason: Ness/Lopez runner dropping from SOC10000. Always dangerous with these connections.

selections.name: Risk Factor
selections.reason: Won CLM10000C last out. Steps up but has the rail and tactical speed.

selections.name: Jasper's Pride
selections.reason: Dropping from AOC52500 company. Class relief makes him a logical exotic player.

danger_horse.name: Embrace My Uncle
danger_horse.reason: Consistent runner who could grab a piece if the pace melts down.

selections.name: Drop Shot
selections.reason: Ships in from Saratoga MSW company. Massive class edge and speed figure advantage.

selections.name: Practical Joker
selections.reason: Solid 3rd in MSW company over this course. Logical alternative to the favorite.

selections.name: Pure Octane
selections.reason: Rail draw and a good 3rd in MSW company here. Should get a perfect trip.

selections.name: Citrine
selections.reason: Runner-up in MSW company here last out. Improving and dangerous.

danger_horse.name: Orange Road
danger_horse.reason: Inside draw and tactical speed could allow him to hang on for a minor award.

exotic_strategy.strategy: BEST BET: Win Bet #6. Exacta 6 / 1,3,5. Trifecta 6 / 1,3,5 / 1,2,3,5.

selections.name: Sassafrassness
selections.reason: Ness/Lopez connection. Coming off a sharp win in RHP43050 company. Looks tough to beat.

selections.name: Embrace The Moment
selections.reason: Won ALW46000 last out. Outside draw is perfect for her pressing style.

selections.name: Hue
selections.reason: Won ALW49000 recently. Has the speed figures to contend if the top two falter.

selections.name: Shkhara Fire
selections.reason: Runner-up in CLM30000 company. Steps up but is in good form.

selections.name: Develop Product
selections.reason: Strong 2nd in CLM7500C company. Rail draw and tactical speed make him the top choice.

selections.name: Blazing Bucchero
selections.reason: Ness/Lopez entry dropping from CLM8000C. High speed figures make him very dangerous.

selections.name: Borz
selections.reason: Coming off a win at the CLM7500NW2L level. Improving form.

selections.name: Good News Rocket
selections.reason: Also won at the CLM7500NW2L level. Consistent and fits well here.

danger_horse.name: Federal Exchange
danger_horse.reason: Can flash early speed and might stick around for a piece of the exotics.
